name: plateau
description: Bounded, predictable context for long Claude Code sessions — carry a small, re-grounded signal across steps instead of letting the transcript climb toward the context ceiling. A fact enters the carried signal only if it passes the gate (a Measurement that re-verifies against the repo now), so bounded context can't fill with stale or fabricated claims. While enabled, a SessionStart hook also loads the parent-agent delegation discipline as standing context, so long-horizon sessions automatically operate as a bounded parent that delegates to background orchestrators.
